title: Glasgow Prestwick Airport celebrates processing 25 million e-commerce parcels

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport celebrates processing 25 million e-commerce parcels. Partners gathered at the airport to celebrate the milestone and Chinese New Year after a year of sustained cargo growth, new routes,...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Glasgow Prestwick Airport celebrates processing 25 million e-commerce parcels
